lines: Rufus writes beneath an older cup ruling, then leaves room for an objection.
"You want the moment an exception becomes law. The page never tells us so neatly."

choices.label: Ask why full flow worries him

lines: "I record who survived the ruling and who paid for it. If the same need returns, memory should not depend on the clerk’s mood."
"At full pressure, every faction can afford a generous promise. I am writing for the morning when the pipe narrows again."

choices.label: Leave him to the narrower morning
